case.title: WESTERN LOAN & SAVINGS CO. v. COLORADO SMELTING & MINING

opinion.h1: WESTERN LOAN & SAVINGS CO. v. COLORADO SMELTING & MINING, 212 U.S. 556 (1908)
opinion.h2: WESTERN LOAN & SAVINGS COMPANY, Plaintiff in Error, v. COLORADO SMELTING & MINING COMPANY. No. 581.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John A. Shelton for plaintiff in error.
No appearance for defendant in error.

Judgment reversed with costs, and cause remanded on authority of Western Loan & Sav. Co. v. Butte & B. Consol. Min. Co. 210 U.S. 368, 52 L. Ed. 1101, 28 Sup. Ct. Rep. 720.[ Western Loan & Savings Co v. Colorado Smelting & Mining 212 U.S. 556 (1908) ]
